mapper.sql: t.id, t.transform_id, t.small_order_id, t.small_order_no, t.formal_order_id, t.formal_order_no, t.transform_time, t.transform_user_id, t.transform_user_role, t.transform_scene, t.transform_remark, t.create_time, t.create_by, t.modify_time, t.modify_by, t.row_version, t.row_valid
mapper.select: SELECT FROM vso_order_transform t WHERE t.id = #{value} AND t.row_valid = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO vso_order_transform ( transform_id, small_order_id, small_order_no, formal_order_id, formal_order_no, transform_time, transform_user_id, transform_user_role, transform_scene, transform_remark, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES ( #{transformId}, #{smallOrderId}, #{smallOrderNo}, #{formalOrderId}, #{formalOrderNo}, #{transformTime}, #{transformUserId}, #{transformUserRole}, #{transformScene}, #{transformRemark}, now(), #{createBy}, now(), #{modifyBy}, 1, 1 )

INSERT INTO vso_order_transform ( transform_id, small_order_id, small_order_no, formal_order_id, formal_order_no, transform_time, transform_user_id, transform_user_role, transform_scene, transform_remark, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES
( #{item.transformId}, #{item.smallOrderId}, #{item.smallOrderNo}, #{item.formalOrderId}, #{item.formalOrderNo}, #{item.transformTime}, #{item.transformUserId}, #{item.transformUserRole}, #{item.transformScene}, #{item.transformRemark}, now(), #{item.createBy}, now(), #{item.modifyBy}, 1, 1 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE vso_order_transform t SET
t.transform_remark = #{transformRemark},
t.modify_by = #{modifyBy},
t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now() WHERE t.id = #{id}
UPDATE vso_order_transform t SET t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now(), t.row_valid = 0 WHERE t.id = #{value}
